intended_use: The VX1 assists operators in the real-time manual annotation of 3D anatomical and electrical maps of human atria for the presence of multipolar intra-cardiac atrial electrograms exhibiting spatiotempo
intended_use_full: The VX1 assists operators in the real-time manual annotation of 3D anatomical and electrical maps of human atria for the presence of multipolar intra-cardiac atrial electrograms exhibiting spatiotemporal dispersion during atrial fibrillation or atrial tachycardia.
ground_truth: Unlimited-time physician visual intra-cardiac atrial electrogram annotation by expert readers; consensus adjudication by two expert annotators
other_metrics: Inter-operator agreement between three independent expert readers and VX1 demonstrated strong agreement on presence or absence of dispersed electrograms; VX1 demonstrated superior performance compared to 28 cardiac electrophysiologists (17 seconds per classification) in identifying dispersed vs. non-dispersed electrograms
